LAW AND MOTION 302, NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION AND MOTION TO CONFIRM FINRA-DR ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC'S UNOPPOSED MOTION ON PETITION TO CONFIRM FINRA-DR ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Petitioner MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC's unopposed motion on petition to confirm FINRA-DR arbitration award.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC's unopposed motion on petition to confirm FINRA-DR arbitration award is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
